_meta.purpose: Component audit matrix -- drives aesthetic rework. All booleans reflect actual code inspection of .classes.ts and .tsx files.

legend.depthToken: Uses z-depth-* tokens (NOT hardcoded z-50 etc)
legend.shadowToken: Uses shadow-elevation-* tokens (shadow-sm/md/lg are Tailwind defaults, NOT tokens)
legend.radiusToken: Uses token-based radius (currently all hardcoded rounded-* -- false)
legend.colorTokens: Uses semantic color tokens (bg-primary, text-destructive, etc.)
legend.spacingTokens: Uses token-based spacing (currently hardcoded px/rem -- false for most)
legend.typographyTokens: Uses typography token system (currently hardcoded text-sm etc -- false)
legend.containerQuery: Uses @sm:, @md:, @lg: instead of sm:, md:, lg:

components.name: accordion
components.notes: Uses hardcoded duration-200 for icon rotation. No motion-reduce support. No active state. Missing color token usage -- mostly structural. role=region and aria-labelledby present.

components.name: alert
components.notes: Good semantic color tokens (bg-*-subtle, text-*-foreground, border-*-border). role=alert present. Non-interactive so no hover/focus/active needed. No motion present.

components.name: alert-dialog
components.notes: Uses z-depth-overlay and z-depth-modal tokens. Uses sm: breakpoint (not container query). Hover on action/cancel buttons. No motion-reduce on overlay transitions. Missing aria-label on close action.

components.name: avatar
components.notes: Non-interactive presentational component. Uses bg-muted/text-muted-foreground for fallback. No alt text enforcement in classes (depends on consumer). Missing aria-label guidance.

components.name: badge
components.notes: Good semantic color tokens across all variants. Hover only on ghost/link variants. Non-interactive so focus/keyboard not required. transition-colors present but no duration token.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.notes: Uses @sm:gap-2.5 container query. aria-label=Breadcrumb on nav. aria-disabled on current page. role=link and role=presentation. Good accessibility. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: button
components.notes: Excellent variant coverage with semantic hover/active tokens (*-hover, *-active). aria-disabled on loading/disabled. role=button for non-button elements. Uses transition-colors but no duration token. Missing disabled: prefix in classes (uses aria-disabled pattern instead). Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: card
components.notes: Uses duration-normal token and motion-reduce:transition-none. Uses bg-card, text-card-foreground, border-card-border semantic tokens. Interactive variant has hover/focus. shadow-sm is Tailwind default not token. tabIndex=0 on interactive cards.

components.name: checkbox
components.notes: Good variant support with per-variant border, checked, and ring colors. role=checkbox and aria-checked present. data-[state=checked] used for checked state. Missing hover state. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: collapsible
components.notes: Minimal classes file -- mostly structural. aria-expanded and aria-labelledby present. Uses animate-collapsible-up/down but no motion-reduce. No color tokens (purely structural). Trigger styling delegated to consumer.

components.name: command
components.notes: Uses z-depth-overlay and z-depth-modal. role=combobox, role=listbox, role=option, role=group present. aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-disabled, aria-labelledby all present. data-[disabled] and data-[selected] for styling. Missing hover states in classes. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: container
components.notes: Supports @container queries for child components. Background variants (muted, accent, card). Extensive article typography system. Layout component -- no interactive states needed. Padding and gap classes use Tailwind utility values, not design tokens.

components.name: context-menu
components.notes: Uses z-depth-dropdown. Uses focus: (not focus-visible:) for menu items. role=menuitem, menuitemcheckbox, menuitemradio, group all present. data-[state=open] for active. data-[disabled] for disabled. animate-in/out but no motion-reduce. Missing hover: prefix (uses focus: pattern instead).

components.name: dialog
components.notes: Uses z-depth-overlay and z-depth-modal. bg-card, text-card-foreground, border-card-border semantic tokens. Close button has hover and focus states. aria-label=Close on close button. Uses sm: breakpoint (not container query). Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.notes: Uses z-depth-dropdown. Full ARIA menu roles (menuitem, menuitemcheckbox, menuitemradio, group). Uses focus: (not focus-visible:) for items. animate-in/out with slide animations but no motion-reduce. data-[state=open] for active, data-[disabled] for disabled.

components.name: empty
components.notes: Presentational empty state component. Uses text-foreground, text-muted-foreground semantic tokens. No interactive states needed. No ARIA roles or labels (depends on context).

components.name: grid
components.notes: Layout component with bento patterns (editorial, dashboard, feature, portfolio). Uses @sm:, @lg:, @xl: container queries for auto columns. Golden ratio grid support. No color or interactive states -- purely structural.

components.name: hover-card
components.notes: Uses z-depth-popover. bg-popover, text-popover-foreground tokens. animate-in/out with slide/zoom but no motion-reduce. shadow-lg is Tailwind default. Triggered by hover -- keyboard accessibility depends on trigger element.

components.name: input
components.notes: Good variant support with per-variant border and ring colors. aria-invalid set when variant=destructive. aria-disabled present. Native <input> so inherently keyboard navigable. Missing hover state. Missing motion-reduce. Screen reader labels depend on associated <label>.

components.name: item
components.notes: Uses duration-fast token and motion-reduce:transition-none. role=option, aria-selected, aria-disabled present. tabIndex=0 for keyboard access. text-muted-foreground for description. Missing explicit hover state (uses focus-visible instead).

components.name: kbd
components.notes: Presentational component for keyboard shortcut display. Uses bg-muted, text-muted-foreground, border-border tokens. shadow-sm is Tailwind default. Non-interactive. Semantic <kbd> element.

components.name: label
components.notes: Good variant color tokens (text-primary, text-destructive, etc.). peer-disabled: styling for disabled associated inputs. Semantic <label> element provides screen reader association. Non-interactive.

components.name: menubar
components.notes: Uses z-depth-dropdown. Full ARIA roles (menubar, menuitem, menuitemcheckbox, menuitemradio, group). Uses focus: for items. animate-in/out but no motion-reduce. Arrow key navigation between menus and within. data-[state=open] for active triggers.

components.name: navigation-menu
components.notes: Hover and focus-visible on trigger and link items. aria-expanded on triggers, aria-label=Main navigation on root, aria-labelledby on content. Hardcoded duration-200 for transitions -- not using motion tokens. Missing motion-reduce. Missing z-depth token.

components.name: pagination
components.notes: Uses duration-normal token and motion-reduce:transition-none. Good hover states (bg-primary-hover for active, bg-accent for inactive). aria-disabled on prev/next when at bounds. Uses <nav> element. Missing aria-label on nav.

components.name: popover
components.notes: Uses z-depth-popover. bg-popover, text-popover-foreground tokens. animate-in/out with slide/zoom but no motion-reduce. aria-expanded on trigger. Focus trap queries for focusable elements. shadow-md is Tailwind default.

components.name: progress
components.notes: Uses duration-normal token and motion-reduce:transition-none. Also motion-reduce:animate-none for indeterminate. Good variant colors (bg-primary, bg-destructive, etc.). Non-interactive. Missing aria-valuenow/aria-valuemin/aria-valuemax (check tsx).

components.name: radio-group
components.notes: role=radiogroup and role=radio present. aria-checked for selected state. Roving tabindex pattern for arrow key navigation. border-primary and text-primary tokens. Only default variant (no multi-variant support like checkbox). Missing hover state. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: resizable
components.notes: Focus-visible ring on handle. Disabled state with cursor-not-allowed and opacity-50. Dragging state highlights with bg-primary. aria-disabled present. tabIndex managed. bg-border for handle, bg-background for grip. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: scroll-area
components.notes: Uses @md:rounded-md and @lg:rounded-lg container queries for responsive radius. bg-border for scrollbar thumb. Mostly structural component. Native scroll behavior provides keyboard support. transition-colors on scrollbar but no motion token.

components.name: select
components.notes: Uses z-depth-dropdown. Focus ring on trigger. aria-expanded, aria-selected on items. role=option, role=group present. data-[disabled] styling. animate-in/out but no motion-reduce. Uses focus: (not focus-visible:) for items. Missing hover on trigger.

components.name: sheet
components.notes: Uses z-depth-overlay and z-depth-modal. animate-in/out with hardcoded duration-500/duration-300 (not tokens). Close button has hover/focus. Uses sm: breakpoint (not container query). shadow-lg is Tailwind default. Missing motion-reduce. Missing aria-label on close.

components.name: sidebar
components.notes: Extensive component. Uses z-depth-overlay, z-depth-modal, z-depth-navigation tokens. hover, active, focus-visible, disabled, aria-disabled all present. Sidebar-specific color tokens (bg-sidebar, text-sidebar-foreground, bg-sidebar-accent, etc.). aria-label on close/toggle buttons. Hardcoded duration-200 (not token). Uses md: breakpoint (not container query). Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: skeleton
components.notes: motion-reduce:animate-none present. Good variant colors using *-subtle tokens. animate-pulse for loading animation. Decorative component (aria-hidden typical). Non-interactive.

components.name: slider
components.notes: Good variant support with per-variant range, thumb border, and ring colors. focus-visible ring on thumb. aria-disabled present. tabIndex managed. transition-colors but no duration token. Missing hover state on thumb. Missing motion-reduce. Missing aria-label.

components.name: spinner
components.notes: motion-reduce:animate-none on spin animation. aria-label=Loading on <output> element. sr-only text for screen readers. Good variant colors using border-* tokens. Non-interactive.

components.name: switch
components.notes: Good variant support with per-variant checked color and ring. role=switch and aria-checked present. focus-visible ring on track. transition-colors and transition-transform but no duration tokens. Missing hover state. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: table
components.notes: Hover on rows (hover:bg-muted/50). data-[state=selected]:bg-muted for selected rows. transition-colors on rows. Semantic <table> element. bg-muted, text-muted-foreground tokens. Missing focus-visible for keyboard navigation. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: tabs
components.notes: aria-selected on triggers with roving tabindex. Focus-visible ring on trigger and content. bg-muted, text-muted-foreground for list. transition-all but no duration token. shadow-sm on active tab (Tailwind default). Missing hover state on triggers. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: textarea
components.notes: Same pattern as input: per-variant border and ring colors. aria-invalid when variant=destructive. aria-disabled present. Native <textarea> so inherently keyboard navigable. Missing hover state. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: toggle
components.notes: Good variant support with data-[state=on] for pressed state. hover:bg-muted on all variants. focus-visible ring. disabled styling. transition-colors but no duration token. Missing aria-label guidance (consumer must provide). Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: toggle-group
components.notes: role=group present. hover:bg-muted on items. focus-visible ring. Fewer color variants than individual toggle. bg-muted for default group container. transition-colors but no duration token. Missing motion-reduce.

components.name: tooltip
components.notes: Uses duration-fast token for transition-opacity. bg-foreground, text-background for inverted tooltip style. aria-describedby links trigger to content. z-50 is hardcoded (not z-depth token). shadow-md is Tailwind default. Missing motion-reduce. Missing z-depth token.

components.name: typography
components.notes: Uses @lg:text-5xl container query for h1 responsive sizing. text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted, bg-accent tokens. Semantic HTML elements (h1-h4, p, blockquote, etc.). Hardcoded text-sm/text-xl etc. (not typography tokens). Non-interactive.

criticalGaps: shadowToken: 0/44 -- no shadow-elevation-* tokens exist; all shadows use Tailwind defaults (shadow-sm, shadow-md, shadow-lg)
radiusToken: 0/44 -- all radius values are hardcoded Tailwind utilities (rounded-md, rounded-lg, etc.)
spacingTokens: 0/44 -- all spacing uses hardcoded Tailwind utilities (px-4, py-2, gap-4, etc.)
typographyTokens: 0/44 -- all typography uses hardcoded Tailwind utilities (text-sm, text-lg, font-medium, etc.)
motionReduce: only 7/44 -- most animated components lack prefers-reduced-motion support
motionTokens: only 6/44 -- most use hardcoded duration values or no duration at all
active: only 5/44 -- only button, context-menu, dropdown-menu, menubar, sidebar have active states
hover: only 17/44 -- many interactive components (checkbox, radio-group, switch, slider, select trigger) missing hover
containerQuery: only 6/44 -- most components use sm:/md:/lg: viewport queries instead of @sm:/@md:/@lg:
